beats.action:
EXT. KENNEDY SPACE CENTER - NIGHT

Saturn V roars to life. Flame and smoke engulf the pad as Apollo 11 climbs toward the stars.

INT. EAGLE LUNAR MODULE - DAY

Armstrong and Aldrin watch the gray surface rush up. "Houston, Tranquility Base here. The Eagle has landed."

EXT. MOON SURFACE - DAY

A boot presses into lunar dust. Armstrong descends the ladder. Earth hangs in the black sky behind him.
